synopsis: The Further Adventures: Droid World was a book-and-record in the Star Wars: The Further Adventures series. It was adapted from Star Wars (1977) 47 by Jymn Magon as part of the Buena Vista Records' Read-Along Adventures series. It was produced by Ted Kryczko and released in 1983 as book with 7" 33 ⅓ rpm record and Cassette tape It is unknown who narrated the record as credits were not provided along with the book or record.
title: The Further Adventures: Droid World
